---
title: "R Packages & Resources"
description: |
  This page provides information on R packages, including EHR2PKPD-related tools and other analytical resources.
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
# Note: - As the R package, *EHR*, is still in active development, we recommend installing from our GitHub repository with the following command:
# devtools::install_github('choileena/EHR/EHR/')
```

## R Packages related to *EHR2PKPD*
Additional information about *EHR2PKPD* is available on [Leena Choi's github](https://github.com/choileena).

* [EHR](https://github.com/choileena/EHR): Tools for working with electronic health record data
* [medExtractR](https://github.com/choileena/medExtractR): Medication information extraction from clinical notes
* [PK Data](https://github.com/choileena/pkdata): Pharmacokinetic data processing tools

## Other R Packages
* [BElikelihood](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/BElikelihood/index.html): Likelihood-based methods for bioequivalence analysis
* [PhysicalActivity](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/PhysicalActivity/index.html): Tools for analyzing physical activity data
* [ProfileLikelihood](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/ProfileLikelihood/index.html): Profile likelihood computation and inference
